title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.080 - Building plans — bids
text:
205.080.  Building plans — bids. — All buildings that may be erected or constructed under sections 205.010 and 205.020 shall have the plans and specifications approved by the board of health center trustees and bids advertised for according to law for other county public buildings.
(L. 1945 p. 969 § 8, A.L. 1951 p. 779)
